title: Data Quality Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger data quality foundations judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Data Quality Foundations is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Data Quality Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good data quality foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Data Quality Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
